page_desc: Eyona nkonzo ye-imeyile yethutyana yokukhusela ubumfihlo bakho kunye nokuvimba i-spam.
duplicate_email_error: Idilesi isele ikhona kwithala leencwadi! Zama isimaphambili se-imeyile esahlukileyo.
delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima le bhokisi yangenayo?
privacy_content:
• Asiyigcini imiyalezo isigxina; zicinywa ngokuzenzekelayo.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzekelayo kwedatha rhoqo ngemizuzu engama-20.
faq_content:
Ithatha ixesha elingakanani i-imeyile?

Ithala leencwadi licinywa rhoqo ngemizuzu engama-20 ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo.

Ngaba inkonzo isimahla?

Ewe, inkonzo isimahla ngokupheleleyo.
privacy_policy_content:
• Asiyigcini imiyalezo isigxina; zicinywa ngokuzenzekelayo.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzekelayo kwedatha rhoqo ngemizuzu engama-20.
email_taken_error: Uxolo, eli gama liyetyenziswa ngoku, zama elinye
inbox_full_desc: Ufikelele kumda ophezulu. Nceda wenze i-imeyile entsha.
expiry_warning: Isilumkiso: Le imeyile izakutshatyalaliswa ngokuzenzekelayo emva kwemizuzu engama-20!
